title: Pass 5.D.3: ferrotorch-train Learner LossFn returns pred unchanged across 8 tests
description:
Pass 4 finding (umbrella #982) — ferrotorch-train audit, TEST_INTEGRITY.

src/learner.rs:540, 552, 568, 584, 596, 612, 623, 635 — every Learner test installs LossFn = Box::new(|pred, _target| Ok(pred.clone())) — returns prediction unchanged, ignores target. Construction-only coverage; no test in this file exercises fit() / evaluate() against real loss arithmetic.

Acceptance:
- Replace at least 2-3 tests with a real loss (mse_loss + ground-truth target) to verify gradient flow
- Discriminating sabotage probe: a fit() that overwrites grad with zeros must fail the new test.
